_comment: IMU + seeker noise parameters consumed by the C++ sensor models. GENERATED by sensors/fit_noise_params.py from Allan-variance characterization of a 4 h static record (sensors/generate_imu_data.py). *_bias_instability = recovered Gauss-Markov steady-state std (sigma_GM); the Allan hump-peak bias instability B ~= 0.617*sigma_GM. The loop-closure test (postproc) confirms the in-sim sensor reproduces these. Units: accel m/s^2 & VRW (m/s)/sqrt(s); gyro rad/s & ARW rad/sqrt(s); tau s; scale_factor frac.
